scripts.start: concurrently -n api,tunnel -c blue,green "npx tsx server/local/server.ts" "cloudflared tunnel run ${TUNNEL_NAME:-YOUR_TUNNEL_NAME}"
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=agent && npm run test --workspace=app && npm run test --workspace=server/worker
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p agent/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p app/tsconfig.app.json && tsc --noEmit -p server/worker/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p server/local/tsconfig.json
